diceDesc.cinder: In Weapons, a max roll sets Burn 1 on the target.
diceDesc.gyro: Once per battle, flip to the opposite face.
diceDesc.coil: If it rolls the same value as last turn, +1.
diceDesc.sprout: On a max roll, grows +1 for the run (up to +2).
diceDesc.ashen: On a min roll, the next black die this turn gets +2.
diceDesc.copycat: Once per battle, copy an adjacent die's value.
diceDesc.coreshard: Prismatic wildcard for sets and affinities.

resonance.red-4: A max-face weapon roll applies Burn 2.
resonance.red-6: The first Weapons slot resolves twice.
resonance.blue-2: +1 to every blue die's minimum roll.
resonance.blue-6: Once per turn, a blue die can't roll below average.
resonance.green-2: A die repeating last turn's value gets +2.
resonance.green-4: End of battle: heal 1 per green die.
resonance.green-6: A green die on max grows +1 for the run (up to +3).
resonance.black-2: Black dice may exceed a slot cap (−1 hull).
resonance.black-4: A min-face black roll maxes the next black die.
resonance.black-6: Once per battle, survive a lethal hit at 1 hull.
resonance.grey-4: Grey dice may copy an adjacent value.

perksDesc.hot-charge: A max-face weapon roll deals +2 damage.
perksDesc.ricochet: Weapon A overkill carries to the next enemy.
perksDesc.double-fuse: The first Burn each battle is doubled.
perksDesc.ice-circuit: A shields die at 6+ grants +2 shield.
perksDesc.reflector: A dodge deals 3 damage back to the attacker.
perksDesc.blue-reserve: One extra reserve slot, blue dice only.
perksDesc.stabilizer: The first blue die each turn can't roll 1.
perksDesc.echo: A die repeating last turn's value grants +1 charge.
perksDesc.blood-reactor: Once per turn, pay 2 hull for +3 charge.
perksDesc.sacrifice: Burn a die to pool +4 weapon damage this turn.
perksDesc.back-door: A min-face black roll grants +6 scrap.
perksDesc.spare: Turn start: the lowest die gets +1.

consequence.alerted: you tripped the Warden cache alarm (Sector 1)

driftingPod.text: A survivor pod tumbles across your bow, hull scarred, beacon stuttering. Something moves inside.

out.openAlly: A half-frozen scrapper spills out, grateful, and pays in salvage.
out.openAmbush: Not a survivor — a trap. Charges rake your hull before you seal the lock.
out.sell: A passing hauler takes it sealed, no questions. Coin changes hands.
out.leave: You let it drift on. Some doors are better left shut.

freedCourier.text: A courier drone hangs snared in a mag-net, running lights dimming. Its manifest is still encrypted.

out.free: You slice the net. The drone pings a quiet thanks and vanishes coreward.
out.ransom: You strip the manifest and sell the route. Business is business.
out.ignore: You leave it to the dark. The lights fade behind you.

courierReturns.text: A familiar drone matches your vector — the one you freed. It broadcasts a trader's handshake.

out.discount: It shares a smuggler's route. The next markets owe you a favour.
out.die: It jettisons a spare probability core into your hold.

cursedCargo.text: A sealed strongbox drifts alone, warded with cult glyphs. It is worth a fortune, and it is watching you back.

out.take: You haul it aboard. Somewhere in the dark, a tracking ping answers.
out.jettison: You send it spinning into the void. Whatever wanted it can chase the wreck.

bountyAmbush.text: A lean gunship drops out of the static, matching you exactly. "You're carrying marked cargo, captain. That makes you cargo too."

out.fight: No more talking. She commits — and so do you.
out.bribe: She counts the scrap twice, then peels away. "Nothing personal."

maraStall.text: A patched-together stall hangs off a dead freighter. "Mara," the trader says, not looking up. "You've got the look of someone who breaks things."

out.chat: You trade honest words. Rare currency out here. She almost smiles.
out.browse: You dig through the crates and pull something worth having.
out.robPass: You're gone before she reaches the alarm, pockets full and name burned.
out.robFail: She's faster than she looks. A shock-baton finds your hull as you flee.

maraFavor.text: Mara flags you down, warmer this time. "Word gets around. You dealt straight with me. Pick something — on the house."

out.repair: Her crew patches your hull with practised speed.
out.die: She presses a wrapped core into your hand. "Don't tell the others."

maraColdShoulder.text: Mara's channel opens cold. "The captain who robbed me. Word travels. My prices went up — for you especially."

out.apologize: You pay back double and then some. She grunts. It's a start.
out.walk: You cut the channel. Some bridges stay burned.

derelictReactor.text: A gutted hauler's reactor still ticks over, leaking charge into the dark. You could tap it, if the field holds.

out.siphonPass: The tap holds. Your cells drink deep — a head start on the fights ahead.
out.siphonFail: The field collapses mid-draw and bleeds into your hull.
out.salvage: You cut it apart the safe way and haul off the good plating.

mineFieldGap.text: A drifting minefield chokes the lane. There's a gap, if your piloting is exact — or a long way around.

out.threadPass: Clean run. You slip through the quiet corridor and lose the sector's attention for a while.
out.threadFail: A mine clips you on the way through. The hull remembers it.
out.around: You loop wide and scavenge the drifting wreckage along the edge.

choirBroadcast.text: A structured signal blooms across every band. A calm voice: "You have questions. The Core has already answered them. Only listen."

out.listen: The words settle into you like they were always there. Something shifts, quietly, toward resonance.
out.jam: You blanket the channel with noise. The sector bristles at the insult.

choirGift.text: The Choir's voice returns, gentle. "You listened once. Take this — a shard that remembers how to fall."

out.accept: A black core settles into your rack, cold and eager.
out.refuse: You decline. The voice does not argue. That's the unsettling part.

scrapAuction.text: Scavengers ring a floodlit wreck, bidding on sealed cores. The auctioneer eyes your scrap.

out.bid: Your bid holds. The core is yours — and it's a good one.
out.watch: You pocket a few loose parts nobody bid on.

stowaway.text: You find a stowaway in the aft crawlspace — a mechanic who ran from something worse. "I earn my keep," she says.

out.keep: She reroutes power to a med-loop. Less hull, but she'll patch you after every fight.
out.handOver: You trade her to a passing patrol for coin. Neither of you meets the other's eye.

oldBeaconEcho.text: A fleet beacon still cycles, forty years on. Its keeper-AI stirs. "Report," it rasps. "Where is the fleet?"

out.decryptPass: The log cracks open — old charts spill across your sensors, revealing more of the lane.
out.decryptFail: The encryption holds. Only static, and a word repeated: quieter.
out.leave: You strip the beacon for parts and leave the ghost to its cycle.

leechNest.text: A cluster of leech skiffs feeds on a dead cruiser, cores half-drained. Burn them out, or slip past?

out.burn: You commit to the cull. The nest boils toward you.
out.avoid: You give the nest a wide berth and let the dead cruiser keep its parasites.

driftMerchant.text: A lone merchant hails you, hold full of odd cores. "Straight swap," he offers. "Your worst for a wildcard of mine."

out.swap: You trade your weakest core for one of his. Fair enough, out here.
out.decline: You wave him off. He shrugs and drifts on.

radiationPocket.text: A radiation pocket bars the direct lane. Push through and save time, or detour the safe way.

out.push: You gun it through the glare. It costs hull, but you shave the sector's grip.
out.detour: You take the long, clean route and scavenge as you go.

wardenCache.text: A Quarantine Warden supply cache sits sealed and armed. A recorded voice: "Unauthorised access will be answered."

out.crackPass: The lock yields. Inside: a Warden requisition chit — the next shipyard will honour it.
out.crackFail: The lock screams. Somewhere, a patrol logs your position.
out.leave: You leave the cache to its threats and move on.

alertedPatrol.text: A Warden patrol runs you down, flanked and ready. "Cache tamperer. Hold for inspection." They have no intention of inspecting.

out.engage: You commit to the breakout. They close in.
out.evadePass: You kill your lights and thread their sweep, lifting a few crates on the way out.
out.evadeFail: A picket clips you as you run. You lose the patrol, but not cleanly.

gamblersWreck.text: A ruined casino-barge still runs one game: a single die against the house AI. "Care to test your luck, captain?"

out.rollPass: The die lands your way. The house pays out with a resentful chime.
out.rollFail: The house wins, as houses do. Your stake vanishes.
out.scavenge: You skip the game and strip the derelict tables for parts.

frozenCrew.text: A lifeboat drifts with its crew in cold-sleep, power nearly gone. Thawing them costs fuel and scrap.

out.thaw: The pods hiss open. Grateful hands help patch your hull before they part ways.
out.leave: You can't spare the scrap. You mark their position and move on. Small mercy: they still drift.

crewGratitude.text: The crew you thawed catches up in a patched skiff. "We owe you. Let us tune your dice-racks."

out.crew: They rework your reroll gear. It'll spin one die wider, all run long.
out.pay: They press salvage on you instead, and wave you off toward the Core.

probCoreLeak.text: A probability core is cracking, bleeding raw uncertainty across your hold. It could be stabilised — or harvested.

out.stabilize: A blue core damps the leak. The board settles toward stability, and your hull steadies.
out.harvest: A black core drinks the chaos. Resonance surges, a fresh shard drops — and it costs a little hull.

silentField.text: A field of dead static, no signal, no wreckage. Just the hum of the Rim and your own breathing.

out.drift: Nothing answers. You scavenge loose plating on the way out.

tollGate.text: Scavengers have strung a wreck-gate across the lane and want a toll. Behind it, a single gunship waits.

out.pay: You hand over the scrap. The gate creaks open, grudgingly.
out.fight: You answer the toll with your weapons instead.
out.sneakPass: You drift dark past the gunship's arc and out the far side.
out.sneakFail: They spot you mid-slip. A parting shot finds your hull.

mirrorFlare.text: A mirror-flare blooms off a shattered array, throwing a copy of your own ship back at you — and a shard with it.

out.absorb: You pull a core from your own reflection. It hums with borrowed resonance.
out.lookAway: You shield your sensors and let the flare burn itself out.

driftRace.text: Yusuf's convoy runners idle at a marker buoy. "Fast hull like yours? Race us to the next beacon. Winner takes the pot."

out.race: Your engines eat the lane. You take the pot and their grudging respect.
out.decline: You let them have their fun and pocket a small stake for showing up.

sensorGhost.text: A sensor ghost flickers at the edge of your scope — maybe a wreck, maybe a trap. Sharper sensors could resolve it.

out.reveal: Your array pins it down and maps the lane beyond in the process.
out.fire: You loose a volley at the ghost. It scatters — and something scatters back.

yusufConvoy.text: Yusuf, convoy master, hails you plainly. "Raiders are shadowing my haulers. Escort us through and I'll make it worth your while. Or tax us and be gone."

out.escort: You take point. The raiders won't like it, but Yusuf will remember.
out.tax: You clip his margins and let him pass. He remembers that too.

yusufEscortPaid.text: Yusuf's convoy finds you again, banners bright. "The captain who saw us through! Take a cut of the run — you earned it."

out.bonus: He loads scrap and a spare core into your hold, grinning the whole time.
out.wave: You wave off the pay. Yusuf salutes. Goodwill compounds out here.

silentField.title: The Silent Fields
silentField.body: Pockets of the Rim where every signal dies at the edge. The expedition logged them as safe. Nothing that entered one was ever heard from again — not because it was destroyed, but because it stopped being certain.

oldBeacon.title: Fleet Beacon 7
oldBeacon.body: A relay from the lost expedition, still cycling a forty-year-old handshake into the dark. Its last clear transmission was a single word, repeated: quieter, quieter, quieter.

choirSignal.title: The Choir
choirSignal.body: A structured broadcast that seems to answer questions you have not asked aloud. The cult that formed around it believes the Core is listening. They may be right, which is the frightening part.

driftGraves.title: The Drift Graves
driftGraves.body: Scavenger clans mark their dead by cutting them loose to drift coreward. Over forty years the current has gathered them into a slow, glittering reef of hulls that never quite arrives.

riddleWard.title: Warded Anomalies
riddleWard.body: Some anomalies resolve like locks: feed them the exact outcome and they open. The expedition's engineers called it 'arguing with the dice.' It works, until the dice argue back.

redline.title: Redline
redline.goal: Deal 18+ damage — red dice belong in the weapons.

sensorLance.title: Sensor Lance
sensorLance.goal: Deal 17+ damage — mark first, then fire.

spinalDrive.title: Spinal Drive
spinalDrive.goal: Deal 16+ damage — keep the spinal above a jam.

reactorBank.title: Reactor Bank
reactorBank.goal: Bank 12+ charge — black cores overcharge the reactor.

coldEngine.title: Cold Engine
coldEngine.goal: Bank 12+ charge — a prismatic core drinks deepest.

aegis.title: Aegis
aegis.goal: Raise 10+ shield — blue belongs in the shields.

wall.title: The Wall
wall.goal: Survive the barrage — shields and brace together.

slipstream.title: Slipstream
slipstream.goal: Survive the strike — dodge it clean.

obsidianGamble.title: Obsidian Gamble
obsidianGamble.goal: Deal 16+ damage — obsidian rolls only 1 or 8.

bracewall.title: Bracewall
bracewall.goal: Survive three hits — shield and dodge.

resume.1: Welcome back, captain. I recalculated the odds. Still against us.
resume.2: You're back. The dark didn't miss you. I did, a little.

sectorEnter1.1: The Hush Rim. The name is honest.
sectorEnter1.2: Forty years of silence, and we brought the noise.

lowHull.1: The hull is complaining. So am I, just quieter.
lowHull.2: We're taking this personally now. The hull, I mean.
lowHull.3: 'Structural integrity' is a generous term for what we have.

battleWin.3: Logged as a win. Barely counts, but logged.

nearDeathWin.1: Filing that under: do not repeat.
nearDeathWin.2: We lived. I'll pretend that was the plan.

tideUp.1: Interference is rising. The sector noticed us.
tideUp.2: The static is climbing. It knows we're here.

rareLoot.1: Careful with that one. It… thinks.
rareLoot.2: That core is humming. Cores shouldn't hum.

eventNeg.2: I'd say I told you so. But I didn't. This time.

eventPos.1: That went better than the math promised.
eventPos.2: Take the win, captain. They're rare out here.

idleMap.1: The map won't decide for us, captain.
idleMap.2: Whenever you're ready. The dark can wait.

setComplete.1: Resonance caught. Don't ask how it works.
setComplete.2: The cores are singing together. That's usually a warning.

killJammer.1: The jammer's quiet. I can finally hear myself think.
killJammer.2: No more static from that one. Small mercies.

killLeech.1: It let go. I hate when things touch the dice.
killLeech.2: Detached. My cores are mine again.

killRaider.1: One raider fewer. The Rim keeps score.
killRaider.2: That one won't be salvaging us today.

killChoir.1: The hymn stopped. I don't miss it.
killChoir.2: One less voice in the choir. Good.

killWasp.1: The wasp's gone. Watch your weapon mount anyway.
killWasp.2: Swatted. The rift breeds more, though.

killWarden.1: Its shields are somebody else's problem now.
killWarden.2: Warden down. The wall comes with us.

killScav.1: Drone's slag. It wanted our dice too.
killScav.2: One less drone picking at the wreck.
